Assoc. Prof. Dr.

Sait Ali UYMAZ

Department of Computer Engineering
Faculty of Computer and Information Sciences
Konya Technical University

Research in artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, bio-inspired optimization, medical image analysis, and applied intelligent systems. The work combines methodological research with data-driven solutions for complex academic and industrial problems.

Explore research
SAU

Research areas

Artificial Intelligence

Intelligent methods for perception, reasoning, decision-making, and responsible automation.

Machine Learning

Data-driven predictive and descriptive modelling for scientific and applied problems.

Deep Learning

Representation learning with deep neural architectures for complex and high-dimensional data.

Metaheuristic Optimization

Robust nature-inspired search methods for complex, nonlinear, and constrained optimization tasks.

Artificial Algae Algorithm

Bio-inspired population-based optimization based on the adaptive behaviour of algal colonies.

Federated Learning

Collaborative model training that supports distributed data ownership and privacy-aware learning.

Featured research

Artificial Algae Algorithm

The Artificial Algae Algorithm is a bio-inspired, population-based approach to metaheuristic optimization. It represents candidate solutions as adaptive algal colonies and balances exploration with exploitation through fitness-based search behaviour.

Learn about AAA
